name: boAt 2025 Launch Rockerz 301 ANC, (~30dB) ANC, 13mm Drivers,ENx, 40ms Low Latency,Hall Switch,40H Battery, Stream Ad Free Music via App Support, Bluetooth Neckband, Wireless with Mic Earphones (Green)
description: Active Noise Cancellation(~30dB): By canceling out all the background noise, the microphones don't let unwanted sounds from your commute, or your surroundings get in the way of enjoying high-quality audio. 13mm Drivers: The high performance large drivers pump out dynamic audio for an enthralling experience. ENx Technology: This bluetooth neckband reduces background noise and ensures your voice is heard clearly on calls 40H Battery: Rockerz 301 ANC offers a playback of upto 40 hours. 40ms Low Latency: Its beast mode offers a low latency of 40ms reducing lag for an entertaining gaming experience. boAt Hearables app compatibility: The boAt Hearables app offers easy access to a plethora of controls, customizable modes, upgrades, troubleshooting fixes, and more. Hall Switch: Simply unite the earbuds to turn the neckband off and separate them to turn it on. IPX5: Designed with an IPX5-rated build, these earphones are safeguarded against sweat from heavy workouts or water splashes. So, you can carry them along without worrying about damage.
included_components: Additional Earmuffs, Cable, Neckband, User Manual

name: CodersParadise Pack of 54 One Manga Vinyl Self Adhesive Sticker for Laptop Journal Guitar Mobile Case Waterproof Residue Free Multicolor Anime Stickers 3 Inches for Metal Glass Wooden Plastic Surface
description: Well Made Aesthetic Stickers : Introducing our aesthetic One Piece stickers, meticulously crafted from self-adhesive vinyl. Printed with revolutionary high-definition printers, these stickers unveil mesmerizingly clear and ultra-precise patterns that effortlessly amplify your style. No Repetition : All stickers in package are unique and different from others. We guarantee that the customer will get the exact products as shown in the image. Easy To Use: Our stickers are designed for effortless application. With a self-adhesive backing, you can easily peel and stick them onto any clean and smooth surface. When it's time for a change, they can be removed without leaving behind any sticky residue or damaging the surface. Broad Application: Our One Piece stickers aren't limited to just one application. They can be used to personalize a wide range of items, such as laptops, notebooks, water bottles, car windows, and even walls. Express your style on all your favorite belongings. Different Sizes: Each sticker are of different size from a range of sizes from 2 to 5 inches in length and breadth. This gives you the freedom to bomb your sticker according to your creativity. Boost your laptop's cool factor with these eye-catching stickers. Ultimate Water Protection: Our waterproof stickers are designed to withstand water, ensuring reliable adhesion and vibrant colors even when exposed to wet conditions. Perfect Gift Idea: Searching for a trendy and practical gift? Look no further. Our Vinyl Sticker Pack is an ideal present for creative minds and trendsetters. Share the joy of self-expression with friends and loved ones, allowing them to personalize their world with these durable and stylish stickers.

name: CodersParadise Spy Anime Sticker Pack (50 PCS) | Waterproof Aesthetic Vinyl Stickers for Laptop, Journal, Scrapbook, Helmet, Guitar & Mobile Case | Residue-Free & Self-Adhesive
description: Premium 50-Piece Spy Anime Sticker Pack – A curated collection of Spy Anime Aesthetic Stickers, designed for fans who love Japanese manga, kawaii art, anime characters & aesthetic stationery. Perfect for decorating laptops, water bottles, notebooks, skateboards, helmets & mobile cases. Waterproof, UV-Resistant & Durable Vinyl – Made with high-quality waterproof vinyl material, these stickers stay bright and vibrant even with outdoor use. UV-resistant lamination prevents fading, making them ideal for bikers, travelers, students, gamers & content creators. Easy to Use – Self-Adhesive & Residue-Free Removal – Each sticker comes with strong adhesion that sticks firmly on any smooth surface. Removes cleanly without leaving glue marks. Ideal for scrapbooking, journaling, DIY crafts, diaries, planners, laptops & luggage décor. Multi-Surface Compatibility for All Devices & Accessories – Great for laptop skins, phone cases, tablets, iPads, PS5/Xbox consoles, helmets, skateboards, guitars, notebooks, suitcases, flasks & journals. Perfect for customizing everyday accessories with anime vibes. Perfect Gift for Anime Lovers & Creators – A must-have collectible set for Spy Anime fans, manga lovers, teens, students, artists & aesthetic décor enthusiasts. Ideal gift for birthdays, return gifts, stationery lovers & anyone who loves anime-themed items.
